purpose: Researched lower-cost Instagram transcript alternative, not the default.
notes: Apify page lists pricing from $1.00 per 1,000 results.
The documented input shape accepts one videoUrl per run.
Output fields include url, text, segments, createTime, likeCount, and commentCount.
A smoke test on the sample project URL completed but returned no transcript text, so IGFU does not use this actor as the default.
A sessionid is optional and may improve stability for some public Instagram videos.
